rulings.Case Title: RAMIN SOHEILI et al VS. PATRICIA JOHNSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion Of Costs And Attorney'S Fees To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 1. CROSS-COMPLAINANT PATRICIA JOHNSON'S Motion Of Costs And Attorney'S Fees To Enforce Settlement IS GRANTED. REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS INCURRED AFTER OCTOBER 20, 2006 ARE RECOVERABLE; DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT EVIDENCE AS TO THE REASONABLENESS OF THE HOURLY RATES AND COMPILATION OF HOURS AND COSTS INCURRED AFTER OCTOBER 20, 2006. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN HERTZFELDT VS. NATHAN WEINSTEIN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT BONNIE WEINSTEIN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 6, 2007, ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARD BRAJNIKOFF et al VS. ACCENTCARE INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT ACCENTCARE INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARD BRAJNIKOFF et al VS. ACCENTCARE INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT ACCENTCARE INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD ZUCKER VS. CATELLUS DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION A CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUINITY ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 20, 2007 PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RAMONA M. PINKERMAN et al VS. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preference And Trial Setting;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 5. PLAINTIFF RAMONA PINKERMAN, DEBORAH HAYES, KATRINA COLON, MONA GUERRERO AND TESA GOODMAN'S Motion For Preference And Trial Setting IS OFF CALENDAR, MUST FILE MOTION IN DEPT. 206. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: E. M. MCCARTT VS. PENSCO PENSION SERVICES, INC., INDIVIDUALLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Pltf'S Complaint, And Request To Take Judicial Notice; Motion To Take Judicial Notice Of Contractors/Court Records
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 6. DEFENDANT STEPHEN RUSSELL'S Demurrer To Plaintiff's Complaint, And Request To Take Judicial Notice; Motion To Take Judicial Notice Of Contractors/Court Records: Court orders the Request to take Judicial Notice is granted. The Demurrer (except as to Count Five) is overruled; choice of law issue is not ready for resolution. Demurrer sustained as to Count 5, twenty days to amend. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: IAN HADDOW VS. ERIC KENNEALLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 7. PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUCTION IS DENIED, DAMAGES ARE AN ADEQUATE REMEDY IF PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY SUSTAINS ANY FURTHER DAMAGE. =(302/PJM/KD)`

rulings.Case Title: WENDY COHEN MD VS. MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate, Memoranudm Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 8. PETITIONER WENDY COHEN'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate IS DENIED. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM KENNEDY et al VS. TAMMY J FOXX et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 1, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT TAMMY FOXX'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED, FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. =(302/PJM/PB)
